headline: Countdown to Snap-On (SNA) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Snap-On (SNA) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Snap-on, Raises Price Target to $380
summary: Baird  analyst Luke Junk   maintains Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $375 to $380.
